problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: If Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) is applied to formation, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
